top3.sql:
SELECT ABS(
  (SELECT jumping FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE player_name = 'Player 6') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1) -
  (SELECT jumping FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = (SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE player_name = 'Player 23') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1)
) AS jumping_score_difference
